empty.title: No sites yet
empty.desc: Create your first relay site, or take over an existing one via the CLI.

toast.queued: Job queued — track it on the Jobs page.

upgrade.title: Upgrade Site
upgrade.descMid: will be upgraded to the target version. Current version:
upgrade.errSame: Target version matches the current version.

destroy.title: Destroy Site
destroy.keepMsg: Stops and removes the site container but keeps the data volumes (database/uploads), so it can be rebuilt and restored later.
destroy.purgeMsg: Permanently deletes the site container and data volumes. This cannot be undone.

create.title: New Site
create.slugHint: Lowercase letters/digits/hyphens, 2–32 chars, used for URL and container ID
create.portHint: Leave empty to auto-assign an available port
create.emailHint: Initial admin account for the site
create.siteNamePlaceholder: Name shown on the site's front end
create.announcementHint: Announcement text shown on the site's front end
create.errSlugFormat: Lowercase letters/digits/hyphens only, 2–32 chars, must start with a letter or digit.
create.errPort: Port must be an integer between 1 and 65535.
